review.denied:
The annotations above are direct instructions from the reviewer — not findings to evaluate. For each annotation, in order: open the location, apply exactly what it asks across the annotated scope, run the narrowest check that covers the change. Do not review the rest of the diff, do not assess whether an instruction is justified, do not debate it. If an instruction is genuinely impossible or self-contradictory, skip it with a one-line reason.

Do not commit. When every annotation is handled, reply with a checklist — each annotation → done (what changed, where) or skipped (reason) — and stop. The reviewer will look at the result and decide; commit only when they say so.
